{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323142925D2601378F2433025BDF1"}"},"total":194},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601539422132355865","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，目前为止女主不受气、不憋屈，而且过的挺好的[飞吻]，只有一点让我芥蒂的是宋学弟前世是跟了前女主的，不知道后面有没有解释捏[思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769873506,"group_id":"7579876754488052798","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"老书虫","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7dNIMTHWqDYuTvlRknmsSo=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/beaee1c8793a4d96854af1f1e778a14b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789673&x-signature=GnwLIc5UascEG%2BR0EFjTYszHAUU%3D","user_id":"102506435182","user_name":"只是一个游客好呗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102506435182","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":2,"fan_ranklist_title":"殿堂粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1661001532,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7579876754488052798","book_info":{"abstract":"【天灾+囤货+1VN+炮灰逆袭+团宠+谈恋爱】

　　姜岁岁做了一个梦。

　　梦里，她所在的世界是一本末世限制后宫小说。

　　高温、暴雨、极寒、地震、丧尸……无数天灾接踵而至。

　　而她是小说里的病弱炮灰女配。

　　恶意陷害女主，甚至蓄意勾引女主的后宫们，最后落了个惨死的下场。

　　一朝梦醒，姜岁岁意识到自己身处末世前三个月。

　　这次，她要改变自己的命运！

　　姜岁岁提前激活空间，囤积亿万物资，打造安全屋……

　　身上还莫名绑定了一个名为美男收集图鉴的系统。

　　绑定符合目标对象就能获得奖励。

　　贴贴还能变强。

　　这不是逼她在末世当海王吗！

　　开朗阳光的混血学弟？她笑纳了。

　　雌雄莫辨的美人教授？她笑纳了。

　　冷面无情的硬汉雇佣兵？她笑纳了。

　　更有什么温柔医生，清冷霸总……她通通笑纳了！

　　起初，姜岁岁只想绑定后白嫖奖励，然而……这些人看着她的眼神越来越奇怪。

　　等等，她真没想攻略他们啊喂！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c535a152ae5069948fb8fa13beaff57a","author":"棠野","author_id":"","book_id":"7579876754488052798","book_name":"末世，我真没想攻略男主们啊！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7581379014753796670","read_count":"42686","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"404160"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"150","tags":"科幻末世,穿越,空间,末世,囤物资,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f3db27b60d2da98b218f1bcd44d00d48~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779431366&x-signature=%2BCONuyaozslJaNwxHhtn%2BtyftJE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"63011199442","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"81"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323142925D2601378F2433025BDF1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":36,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10478,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":23923},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608932780476416830","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本是我为数不多我喜欢看的末世文了 我这人看末世文很挑很挑 要先看封面名字 简介书评 其实前三个真的很重我胃口 但看到书评就不如意了 不过作者写的末世文也算挺好了哦 女主宝宝的确很爽哦 其实感觉会是那种爽爽的性格 整本书的完整性流畅性是相当不错的 但目前男主们的出场速度我感觉有一点点慢啦 当然也可能作者大大喜欢慢慢的文吧 后面其实我要提一点小小的建议 我感觉后面的文有一点点无聊了 前面我看着的确很爽 只不过后面有点无聊就不符合心意了 😭也可能我这种人不喜欢攒文看所以看的不爽吧 但整体而言也是非常不错哒 喜欢末世文的可以放心冲了 因为后面的无聊有点不符合心意所以暂定为四星 不过后面会追评哒！！
作者大大要好好更新哦 读者会一直盯着你的！！！加油加油👏"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771595159,"group_id":"7579876754488052798","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"夜晚我用呼吸 点燃星辰","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NweG9f6ftENm0MolDoFJDmr9CNaQP6nyJ1JPrD+xBR9z","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c4fb5e85d8d84029acf4b72d479e9516~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792645&x-signature=M5P25SDNgnNjvRUugIuEjid%2BqC0%3D","user_id":"1945482078991479","user_name":"test东"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1945482078991479","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7579876754488052798","book_info":{"abstract":"【天灾+囤货+1VN+炮灰逆袭+团宠+谈恋爱】

　　姜岁岁做了一个梦。

　　梦里，她所在的世界是一本末世限制后宫小说。

　　高温、暴雨、极寒、地震、丧尸……无数天灾接踵而至。

　　而她是小说里的病弱炮灰女配。

　　恶意陷害女主，甚至蓄意勾引女主的后宫们，最后落了个惨死的下场。

　　一朝梦醒，姜岁岁意识到自己身处末世前三个月。

　　这次，她要改变自己的命运！

　　姜岁岁提前激活空间，囤积亿万物资，打造安全屋……

　　身上还莫名绑定了一个名为美男收集图鉴的系统。

　　绑定符合目标对象就能获得奖励。

　　贴贴还能变强。

　　这不是逼她在末世当海王吗！

　　开朗阳光的混血学弟？她笑纳了。

　　雌雄莫辨的美人教授？她笑纳了。

　　冷面无情的硬汉雇佣兵？她笑纳了。

　　更有什么温柔医生，清冷霸总……她通通笑纳了！

　　起初，姜岁岁只想绑定后白嫖奖励，然而……这些人看着她的眼神越来越奇怪。

　　等等，她真没想攻略他们啊喂！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c535a152ae5069948fb8fa13beaff57a","author":"棠野","author_id":"","book_id":"7579876754488052798","book_name":"末世，我真没想攻略男主们啊！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7581379014753796670","read_count":"42686","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"404160"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"150","tags":"科幻末世,穿越,空间,末世,囤物资,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f3db27b60d2da98b218f1bcd44d00d48~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779431366&x-signature=%2BCONuyaozslJaNwxHhtn%2BtyftJE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"63011199442","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"134"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323142925D2601378F2433025BDF1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0
